title: MCPProxy profiles config (Spec 057)
description: Optional top-level `profiles` array. Absent/empty is fully supported (zero migration; /mcp unchanged).

profiles.description: Named, stateless, server-scoped views addressable at /mcp/p/<name>.

name.description: URL slug. Used verbatim as /mcp/p/<name>. Must be unique. Reserved slugs are rejected.

servers.description: References to mcpServers[].name. Unknown names warn-and-skip (FR-015). Empty list is legal (warns; exposes zero tools).
